description: Dr. Maya Chen Clinic was founded in New York with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Pacific Meridian Care was born in 2017 from Dr. Maya Chen's vision to bridge ancient wisdom with modern understanding in the heart of New York City. Having witnessed the profound healing potential of Traditional Chinese Medicine, she established our clinic as a sanctuary where time-honored practices meet contemporary evidence-informed care.

Our practice is rooted in the belief that true healing addresses not just symptoms, but the underlying patterns of disharmony within the body's energy systems. We serve a diverse community of New Yorkers, from busy professionals seeking relief from chronic pain to families exploring natural approaches to wellness. Each patient receives personalized attention, with treatments carefully tailored to their unique constitution and health goals.

Since opening our doors, we've had the privilege of guiding hundreds of patients toward greater balance and vitality. Our clinic has become a trusted cornerstone in NYC's integrative healthcare landscape, where the ancient art of meridian therapy flourishes alongside modern medical understanding.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Maya Chen earned her Doctor of Acupuncture and Chinese Medicine (DACM) and holds board certification from the National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine (NCCAOM). With over 12 years of clinical experience, she has dedicated her practice to the specialized treatment of pain management, helping patients find relief from chronic conditions through the harmonization of qi and meridian systems.

Dr. Chen's approach to healing is deeply rooted in classical TCM principles while embracing evidence-informed practices that demonstrate measurable outcomes. She believes in treating each patient as a whole person, carefully assessing their unique constitutional patterns and lifestyle factors to create comprehensive treatment plans. Her expertise spans the full spectrum of TCM modalities, including precision acupuncture techniques, customized herbal formulations, therapeutic cupping, moxibustion, and Tuina massage.

Fluent in both English and Mandarin, Dr. Chen serves as a cultural bridge for many patients, ensuring that the profound wisdom of Traditional Chinese Medicine is accessible to all. Her gentle yet effective treatment style reflects her deep understanding that healing is not just about eliminating symptoms, but about restoring the natural flow of vital energy throughout the body, allowing patients to reclaim their innate capacity for wellness and vitality.
profile.name: Dr. Maya Chen, L.Ac., DACM
profile.quote: When we restore the natural flow of qi through the meridians, the body remembers its inherent wisdom to heal.
profile.title: Licensed Acupuncturist

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Maya Chen addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Maya Chen takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Maya Chen collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Maya Chen's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Maya Chen has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
